categories.description: The exemption certificate has been reviewed and marked verified. Includes exemption type, issuing jurisdiction, valid_from + valid_until, and verification method (manual/automatic).

The exemption certificate has been reviewed and rejected. Includes reason (invalid_certificate / expired_at_creation / jurisdiction_mismatch / fraudulent / other), reviewer notes, and remediation steps.

The exemption certificate expires in 60/30/7 days (three-stage cadence). Includes exemption type, valid_until date, and re-application steps. Customer should renew before the certificate expires to avoid being charged tax on future purchases.

A tax provider (TaxJar / Avalara / Stripe Tax) has been marked unreachable after N consecutive failures. New tax calculations are BLOCKED for the affected jurisdictions — invoice lines will queue up until the breaker resets. Includes provider name, last error, open-until timestamp, and reset instructions.

REGULATOR-CRITICAL. The weekly reconciliation spot-check found that historical tax calculations diverge from current-day provider re-computation. May indicate a rate change the provider missed, or a provider algorithm change. Includes provider, sample size, drift percentage, and remediation steps (typically: contact provider support + review tax filings).
